name: Notifications system
searchText: notifications system mantine notifications system @mantine/notifications /x/notifications autoclose containerwidth limit notificationmaxheight pauseresetonhover portalprops position store transitionduration withinportal zindex

props.name: autoClose
props.description: Auto close timeout for all notifications in ms, false to disable auto close, can be overwritten for individual notifications in notifications.show function

props.name: limit
props.description: Maximum number of notifications displayed at a time, other new notifications will be added to queue

props.name: pauseResetOnHover
props.description: Determines which notifications should pause auto close on hover, 'all' – pauses auto close for all notifications when any notification is hovered, 'notification' – pauses auto close only for the hovered notification

props.name: portalProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Portal component

props.name: store
props.description: Store for notifications state, can be used to create multiple instances of notifications system in your application

props.name: withinPortal
props.description: Determines whether notifications container should be rendered inside Portal
